vocabulary.example_sentence: Please paste your picture on the class poster.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请把你的照片贴在班级海报上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We dressed up for the school gala.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们为学校晚会盛装打扮。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our class prepared a wonderful gala show.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们班准备了一场精彩的晚会演出。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Let's count down to the New Year together.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 让我们一起倒计时迎接新年。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He ran in a marathon last Sunday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他上周日参加了马拉松比赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She worked as a judge at the school race.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她在学校比赛中担任裁判。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The boys' race began at nine o'clock.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 男生赛跑九点开始。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He ran faster than ever before.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他跑得比以往任何时候都快。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We cheered loudly for our team.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们大声为队伍加油。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I bought two books at the school book fair.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我在学校书市买了两本书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A famous writer came to talk at our book fair.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 一位著名作家来我们的书市做讲座。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I read a story from my new book yesterday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我昨天读了一本新书里的故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We made colourful masks for the gala.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们为晚会做了彩色的面具。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The students sang a song on stage.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学生们在舞台上唱了一首歌。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She wore a red dress to the show.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她穿着红色连衣裙去看演出。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The book fair was yesterday afternoon.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 书市是昨天下午举办的。

vocabulary.example_sentence: There is a notice about the race on the board.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 公告栏上有一张关于赛跑的通知。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I woke up early for the marathon.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 为了马拉松我早早醒来了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We can talk about the winners later.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们待会儿再讨论获胜者。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The judge announced the winner of the race.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 裁判宣布了比赛的获胜者。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The race will begin in five minutes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 比赛将在五分钟后开始。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our team won the relay race.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们队在接力赛中获胜了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The winner received a medal and flowers.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 获胜者获得了奖牌和鲜花。

vocabulary.chinese: 以往任何时候（用于加强比较）
vocabulary.example_sentence: It was the most exciting race ever.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这是有史以来最激动人心的比赛。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The gala was exciting from start to finish.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 晚会从头到尾都令人激动。
